description:
___
###[choco://unifying-fut](choco://unifying-fut)
To use choco:// protocol URLs, install [(unofficial) choco:// Protocol support ](https://chocolatey.org/packages/choco-protocol-support)
___


	Logitech Unifying firmware updates to address potential security vulnerabilities found by Bastille Security in 2016.
	
	REFERENCE: https://support.logi.com/hc/en-us/community/posts/360032078393-Logitech-Response-to-Research-Findings
	REFERENCE: https://betanews.com/2019/07/16/logitech-wireless-dongle-mousejack/
	
	**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/blob/master/unifying-fut/readme.md)**
    

___

Click here to [Patreon-ize](https://www.patreon.com/bcurran3) the package maintainer.
___
summary: Updates the firmware on your Unifying receiver and some devices.
author: Logitech
